message:
fix: canonicalize paths before comparison in routing, sync, and doctor

resolve_route now normalizes local_beads_dir via dunce::canonicalize
before comparing against the resolved town_beads_dir, preventing
duplicate batches when a self-route resolves to a non-canonical path.
require_safe_sync_overwrite_path drops the redundant is_internal
pre-check so noncanonical-but-internal paths are correctly approved
by validate_sync_path. doctor's should_fallback_to_workspace_jsonl
uses a new normalize_doctor_path helper instead of raw == so paths
with .. components compare equal to their canonical equivalents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
